sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10682" key="a)ntifuteu/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιφῠτεύω</orth>, <sense id="n10682.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">implant in turn</tr_>: metaph., <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἔρις ἔριν ἀ.</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1605.tlg001:78" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Phoc.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">78</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
